channel.title: Gnarly Void - pottery
channel.description: Tufted fiber art, weaving, pottery, and handmade objects by Jake Goldsborough in the Pacific Northwest.

item.title: Glazed Pottery - Batch 2
item.author: site@gnarlyvoid.com (Jake Goldsborough)
item.description: This is now my second batch of glazed pottery. I'm definitely seeing improvements with my shaping and consistency. I was disappointed in a few of the overlapping glaze experiments I tried but that's how you learn. At this point, I think I have enough pots and experience that I can start to get a little pickier with what I send to fire. I have a bunch of pinch pots that got bisque fired that I hope to glaze fire and show soon.

item.title: Glazed pottery - Batch 1
item.author: site@gnarlyvoid.com (Jake Goldsborough)
item.description:
Process

Slab built by hand

Materials

Clay from Georgie's:

  • White Salmon with Speckles
  • Trail Mix
  • Timberline

Various glazes
